title: Senior Financial Analyst - Equitas Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Equitas Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Equitas Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank:
Equitas Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank!
